Episodes.Title: Ripped Apart
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Antony Anderson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Greg Ellwand, Robin Schisler
Episodes.Plot: This special looked at accidents and incidents where pressurization failure or explosive decompression played a part.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Flaw
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Antony Anderson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, James McGowan, Dwayne Hill
Episodes.Plot: This special looked at accidents caused by seemingly minor defects or errors.

Episodes.Title: Who's Flying the Plane?
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Antony Anderson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Victor A. Young, Nicholas Kilbertus
Episodes.Plot: Accidents and incidents where problems with the interface between crew members and onboard avionics were a factor, and the causes of those problems.

Episodes.Title: Fight for Your Life
Episodes.Plot: A FedEx flight from Memphis makes an emergency return when the crew is attacked. The investigation reveals a troubled pilot and serious flaws in management.
